title: Impossible for one individual to find answer to pendency of cases: Former Law Minister Ashwani Kumar
description: Former Union Law Minister Ashwani Kumar on Thursday said that the problem of judicial pendency has persisted across governments and that there are no easy solutions to it, due to the complexity of the system.Speaking at the launch of his book Guardians of the Republic: Essays on the Constitution, Justice, and the Future of Indian Democracy at the India International Centre, Kumar said,“All Law Ministers, to the best of their ability, have tried to do something or the other. But the system is so
